title: Can't unroll generate for with complicated incrementer/init/test

features.name: generate for with ternary incrementer
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop using a genvar index with a ternary operator in the incrementer expression
features.snippet:
genvar x;
for(x = 1; x < 24; x = (x == 5) ? 10 : x + 1)
